description.name: DigiTimber DarkTheme (DTDT) for WHMCS
description.tagline: Dark mode for the WHMCS Blend admin theme.
description.long: Comprehensive dark theme for the WHMCS Blend admin theme, covering WHMCS 8+ core, Layers dashboard, Lagom 2 client framework surfaces, staffboard module and inline-style status colors. Token-driven CSS - reskin the whole theme by editing :root. Derived from WevrLabs' Blend Dark Mode (GPL-3.0).
features: Full dark UI for the Blend admin theme.
CSS variable token system - 67 tokens for easy reskinning.
Optional dark/light toggle per admin - preference remembered in browser, first-time visitors get their OS preference.
Optional date/time widget in the top nav bar.
Optional open-ticket-count badge in the top nav bar.
custom.css override file that survives module updates.

credits.name: WevrLabs Hosting
credits.role: Original Blend Dark Mode addon (GPL-3.0-licensed), source of the CSS foundation.

credits.name: LoneStarDataRanch
credits.role: Proposed a dark/light toggle for the upstream WevrLabs project via an open pull request (Aug 2025, unmerged), which inspired the toggle implementation in this module.
